title: [FIRRTL] CheckCombLoops: does not find all comb loops

features.name: self-driven wire creating combinational loop
features.description: Code should include a wire that is assigned to itself via a continuous assignment, forming a direct combinational loop on a net

features.name: output port driven with high-impedance literal from undriven wire
features.description: Code should include an output port assigned a high-impedance literal value due to an unresolved or undriven wire propagating to the port

features.name: multi-module design with isolated combinational loop in non-top module
features.description: Code should include a circuit with multiple independent top-level modules where one non-primary module contains a self-driven wire, exercising comb-loop checks across module boundaries
